name: EQUATOR Beverage Co
business: EQUATOR Beverage Company develops, produces, distributes, and markets ready-to-drink beverages and sparkling energy beverages that are Non-GMO Project Verified and USDA Organic certified. Its products are sold in North America, the Caribbean, and Bermuda through third-party distributors and retail channels. The company sells over 8 million units per year.

exposures.sentence: The Company is engaged in the development, production, distribution, and marketing of a portfolio of beverage products.
